command.description: Which build decision command to run

githubTokenSecret.description: Name of the Taskcluster secret containing a GitHub token (key: 'token')

pulseMessage.description: Pulse message payload (required for hg-push command)

taskclusterYmlRepo.description: Alternative hg repo URL from which to fetch .taskcluster.yml (hg-push only)

branch.description: Branch to use when fetching push info (cron only)

forceRun.description: Force-run a specific named cron job, skipping schedule checks (cron only)

cronInput.description: Additional input passed to cron jobs that set include-cron-input (cron only)

dryRun.description: If true, log what would happen but do not create any tasks
